item.title: First Post
item.author: Kaleb Hawkins
item.description: Welcome to whatever this is. As this is my first post and I am not a planner I can’t really say much about what this blog will contain, my focuses shift from day to day. I have dabble in everything from Powershell scripting to Go system tooling, and so much more. I hope that some posts are helpful for anyone that stumbles upon them. I will likely have a heavy focus on Go and my game developement journey.
